title: Bridge Essay: Hierarchical predictive coding in distributed pain circuits.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference as causal cognition.

**Hierarchical predictive coding in distributed pain circuits.**. Front Neural Circuits.. PMID: 36937818. DOI: 10.3389/fncir.2023.1073537. Predictive coding is acomputational theory on describing how the brain perceives and acts, which has been widely adopted in sensory processing and motor control. Nociceptive and pain processing involves alarge and distributed network of circuits. However, it is still unknown whether this distributed network is completely decentralized or requires networkwide coordination.
